title: VS Code Copilot installed MCP registration and protocol handshake
command: ./install-tools.sh --mcp; validate .vscode/mcp.json has only direct installed commands; run installed feedback-mcp initialize and tools/list
detail: Validates the supported VS Code `servers` schema, installed-binary commands (not Cargo), the complete MCP installer group, and feedback-mcp's five-tool stdio protocol surface.
